topics.title: Overview of Mechatronics: Definition, Scope, and Applications of Mechatronic Systems
Interdisciplinary Approach: Integration of Mechanical, Electronic, and Software Components
Mechanical Components: Introduction to Actuators, Sensors, and Mechanical Structures; Selection Criteria and Compatibility Considerations
Electronic Components: Overview of Microcontrollers, Sensors, and Signal Conditioning Circuits; Interfacing Techniques and Circuit Design for Integration
Modeling Techniques: Introduction to Mathematical, Physical, and Empirical Models; Modeling Mechanical, Electrical, and Control Subsystems
Simulation Tools: Hands-on Experience with Simulation Software (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink, LabVIEW); Simulating Mechatronic Systems to Analyze Performance and Behavior
Control Theory Basics: Introduction to Control Systems (Feedback, PID Control, and System Stability); Design Considerations for Mechatronic Control Systems
Implementation and Testing: Practical Implementation of Control Algorithms on Hardware Platforms; Testing and Validation of Mechatronic Systems Using Simulation and Real-World Experiments
